query: SELECT opening, COUNT(*) as count FROM puzzles WHERE opening LIKE '%Queen%Gambit%' OR opening LIKE '%Gambit%' GROUP BY opening ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT opening, COUNT(*) as count FROM puzzles WHERE opening LIKE '%Queen%Gambit%' OR opening LIKE '%Gambit%' GROUP BY opening ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20;
